messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] Cannot log in
messages.body_plain:
I am trying to update GeneticsPed, but cannot log in as I get an error
message saying my email address is not associated with the maintainer of
any package.

-- 
David Henderson, Ph.D.
18476 47th Place NE
Lake Forest Park, WA 98155
206-794-8552
